raw_response: Given your quality sensitivity and brand familiarity with Sennheiser, the Sennheiser Momentum 4 Wireless headphones are an excellent choice. They offer top-tier sound quality and a remarkable 60-hour battery life. While touch controls may have a slight learning curve, their strong noise cancellation and aptX Adaptive codec support make them stand out. These headphones balance your budget constraints while delivering premium audio performance.
